scripts.build: npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.vercel-build: npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run prisma:migrate --prefix backend && npm run seed --prefix backend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
